title: Alberta budget 2020 education funding cut
notes: Budget 2020 K-12 education: provincial government-funded portion essentially FLAT ($7.209B vs $7.218B — decrease of $9M). School boards expected to draw $681M from own reserves and own-source revenue. 138 certificated + 106 non-certified positions not replaced. ATA president Schilling: 'fails to address needs.' NOTE: This is NOT the $128M COVID redirection — that was a separate action Mar 28 2020 (R-089). EVT-054 description corrected accordingly. Anchors EVT-054.
